---
title: "Projects"
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

::: {.card}
## validationcheck

Currently working on an R package for automated data validation.

### Features

- Missing value checks
- Duplicate detection
- Data quality reports

GitHub Repository [Link]("https://github.com/roy-mwavita0/validationcheck")

:::
:::
:::
